Container.Name: MinusPod
Container.Overview: Self-hosted podcast ad removal. Transcribes episodes with Whisper, uses an LLM to detect and cut ad segments, and serves modified RSS feeds and processed audio. Configured here for CPU-only operation with Groq (transcription) and OpenRouter (ad detection LLM). After first launch, set your web UI password via Settings > Security — the APP_PASSWORD env var is documented by MinusPod but not implemented.
Container.Description: Self-hosted podcast ad removal. Transcribes episodes with Whisper, uses an LLM to detect and cut ad segments, and serves modified RSS feeds and processed audio. Configured here for CPU-only operation with Groq (transcription) and OpenRouter (ad detection LLM). After first launch, set your web UI password via Settings > Security — the APP_PASSWORD env var is documented by MinusPod but not implemented.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port for the MinusPod web interface and RSS feed server.

Config.Name: Data Path
Config.Description: Where MinusPod stores its database, processed audio, and backups.

Config.Name: Base URL
Config.Description: The externally-accessible URL of this server, used to generate RSS feed and audio URLs. Example: http://192.168.1.100:8000. Must match the host IP and port above.

Config.Name: Master Passphrase
Config.Description: Long random string used to encrypt API keys at rest. Pick something and don't lose it — restoring a backup requires the same passphrase.

Config.Name: LLM Provider
Config.Description: LLM provider for ad detection. Leave as 'openrouter' unless switching providers.

Config.Name: OpenRouter API Key
Config.Description: API key from openrouter.ai/keys. Used for ad detection LLM calls.

Config.Name: LLM Model
Config.Description: OpenRouter model ID for ad detection. google/gemini-2.5-flash is the recommended production pick (fast, reliable JSON, good accuracy). Seeds the database on first startup only — change it afterwards in Settings UI.

Config.Name: Whisper Backend
Config.Description: Set to 'openai-api' to use a remote Whisper endpoint (Groq). Leave as-is.

Config.Name: Whisper API Base URL
Config.Description: Groq's OpenAI-compatible Whisper endpoint. Leave as-is unless using a different provider.

Config.Name: Groq API Key
Config.Description: API key from console.groq.com. Used for Whisper transcription.

Config.Name: Whisper Model
Config.Description: Groq Whisper model. whisper-large-v3-turbo is fast and accurate for English podcasts.

Config.Name: Whisper Device
Config.Description: Set to 'cpu' when using a remote Whisper API (no local GPU needed).
